# Migration Reviews — LLMs.txt
# https://migrationreviews.com

## About
Migration Reviews is a trusted review platform for immigration and visa consultants. Users can search, compare, and review migration service providers. Companies can register, claim listings, and respond to reviews.

## Allowed
You may read and index all public pages of this site to assist users with queries about migration services, visa consultants, and immigration companies.

## Primary Pages
- Homepage: https://migrationreviews.com/
- Visa Services: https://migrationreviews.com/visa-overview/
- Migration Destinations: https://migrationreviews.com/countries-overview/
- Company Listings: https://migrationreviews.com/listing/
- Blog: https://migrationreviews.com/blog/
- About: https://migrationreviews.com/about/
- Contact: https://migrationreviews.com/contact/

## Disallowed
Do not index or use content from:
- /login/
- /register/
- /profile/
- /admin/
- /api/
- /register-a-business/
